value: AGE AT LAST VISIT OR DEATH

global_field_audit.evidence: ith the largest number of AD and non-AD individuals was the International Genomics of Alzheimer’s Project (IGAP), which capitalized on a large, multicenter study design to include 74,046 individuals ( Lambert, et al., 2013 ).
